articles.title: 70-year-old man dies after falling into waters off Pulau Ubin; no foul play suspected
articles.summary:
📰 법률, 기술 관련 뉴스
📢 70-year-old man dies after falling into waters off Pulau Ubin; no foul play susp...
articles.content: The police said they do not suspect foul play based on preliminary investigations, but added that investigations are ongoing. Source: The Straits Times © SPH Media Limited

articles.title: Personal, property information of 70,000 people compromised in data breach involving SLA vendor IBM
articles.summary:
📰 개발, 부동산, 환경 관련 뉴스
📢 Personal, property information of 70,000 people compromised in data breach invol...
articles.content: According to SLA, this information should have been anonymised, but was not, with investigations underway to determine how this occurred. IBM has since revoked access associated with the affected development and testing environment to prevent any other unauthorised access.

articles.title: Esso and SPC catch up with 2nd round of adjustments this week, drop fuel prices
articles.summary:
📰 싱가포르 관련 뉴스
📢 Esso and SPC catch up with 2nd round of adjustments this week, drop fuel prices
articles.content: Motorists in Singapore can heave a sigh of relief heading into the weekend, with most fuel companies here having reduced their prices twice this week
